title: streptanthus tortuosus var. suffrutescens
intro: Streptanthus tortuosus var. suffrutescens, also known as the western tower mustard, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
